name: Stir-Fried Minced Chicken
recipeInstructions:
------------------------TO MARINATE------------------------
1/4 tsp Salt
1 tbsp Cornstarch
1 tbsp Cold water
----------------------SEASONING SAUCE----------------------
1 tsp Salt
1 1/2 tbsp Soy sauce (light)
2 tsp Cornstarch
1 tsp Sesame oil
2 tbsp Soup stock
1/16 tsp Black pepper
(or soaked black mushrooms) (or spring roll skin)
1. Heat oil until very hot. Deep fry the rice noodles for 2-3 seconds on each side, then transfer to a platter and crush with a fork or chopsticks.
2. Cut chicken into 1/4 inch cubes. Marinate with salt, cornstarch, and water for at least 20 minutes. Then fry in 1 cup of hot oil for 30 seconds and drain.
3. Make a thin pancake with the beaten eggs, cut into 1/4 inch cubes.
4. Heat 3 tablespoons of oil in a pan. Stir fry mushrooms, bamboo shoots, green beans, and ham for 1 minute. Add fried chicken, egg cubes, and seasoning sauce. Stir fry over high heat until thickened. Add white leeks and turn off the heat immediately. Place on the platter over the fried rice noodles.
5. Serve with Mandarin Dan Bing or spring roll skin to wrap around the meat and noodle mixture.
